# Tailor Express

> Tailor Express is a premium tailoring and alterations chain in Kuwait with 9 branches, all open 24/7, offering in-branch alterations, drive-thru drop-off, home service, and Tailor Cloud smart-locker pickup. Founded in 2019.

## Background

Tailor Express is a Kuwait-based tailoring and alterations chain founded in 2019. It has grown from a single branch to 9 locations across Kuwait, all operating 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The brand combines professional alteration craftsmanship with modern conveniences: home pickup and delivery, drive-thru drop-off, and 24/7 Tailor Cloud smart-locker pickup. It serves 5,000+ customers and completes 20,000+ alteration services every month, with dedicated female tailors and private fitting rooms at every branch and bilingual (English and Arabic) service throughout.

## Business Facts

- Business name: Tailor Express (تيلور إكسبرس)
- Founded: 2019
- Country: Kuwait
- Headquarters: The Avenues Mall, Al-Rai, Al Farwaniyah, Kuwait
- Branch count: 9 locations across Kuwait
- Operating hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, at all 9 branches
- Languages served: English and Arabic
- Phone/WhatsApp: +965 9874 2477
- Email: tailorexpresskw@gmail.com
- Online booking: https://booking.tailorexpresskw.com/b/50569115
- Instagram: @tailorexpress_kw

## Services Offered

- Standard clothing alterations and repairs (hemming, taking in, letting out, zippers, seams, button work)
- Wedding gown and wedding suit alterations
- Abaya alterations and customization
- Dress alterations for cocktail, evening, and formal wear
- Uniform alterations for corporate, school, and organizational clients (bulk orders)
- Drive-thru tailoring drop-off and pickup at 5 branches (Yarmouk, W-Mishrif, Hessa District, Qurtoba, Dasma)
- Home tailoring service across most areas of Kuwait (on-site fittings and delivery)
- Tailor Cloud 24/7 smart-locker pickup at Hessa District
- Dedicated female tailors at all branches for women's garments
- Bilingual customer service (English and Arabic)

## Volume and Experience

- 5,000+ customers served every month
- 20,000+ alteration services completed every month
- 7+ years operating in the Kuwait market (since 2019)
- Most standard alterations completed within 24-48 hours; simple repairs often same-day

## Pricing (starting prices, Kuwaiti Dinar)

- Hem adjustments: from 2 KWD
- Trouser / pants alterations: from 2 KWD
- Dress alterations: from 3 KWD
- Suit jacket alterations: moderate to premium range
- Wedding gown alterations: from 6 KWD
- Every garment receives a written estimate before work begins; no surprise charges.

## Branch Locations

All 9 branches operate 24/7:

1. The Avenues (Al-Rai) — flagship, The Avenues Mall, Al-Rai
2. Hessa District (Hessa Al-Mubarak) — also home to Tailor Cloud 24/7 smart lockers
3. Promenade
4. W-Mishrif (West Mishrif)
5. Yarmouk
6. Qurtoba
7. Zahra Complex (Al-Zahra)
8. Dasma
9. Premium Tailor

(Full street addresses and map links for each branch are listed on the Contact page.)

## Differentiators

- Dedicated, trained female staff at all branches for women's garments
- Private fitting rooms at every branch
- 24/7 service availability at all 9 branches
- Multiple service channels: in-branch, drive-thru, home service, and smart lockers
- Transparent pricing with written estimates before work begins
- Bilingual operations (English and Arabic) throughout
